description: Add a visible invitations section below the teams table in the admin dashboard. Shows pending + expired invitations with a 'Relancer' button that resends the invitation email and extends the expiry.

userStories.title: Server action: fetch pending/expired invitations
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a server action that fetches all pending and expired invitations so the UI can display them.
acceptanceCriteria: getInvitationsAction() returns invitations with status pending or expired
Expired status is computed at query time (pending + expires_at < now = expired)
Returns: id, email, first_name, last_name, status, expires_at, invited_at, team name

userStories.title: UI: invitations section + relancer button
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see pending/expired invitations below the teams table with a Relancer button that resends the invitation.
acceptanceCriteria: Invitations section visible below teams table with title 'Invitations en attente'
Table columns: Nom, Email, Statut (badge), Invite le, Expire le, Actions
Relancer button calls resendGestionnaireInvitationAction and shows toast
Stat card added for pending invitations count
Section hidden when no pending/expired invitations
